clinical_blockers: Noise exposure, recent trauma, tuning-fork testing, prior wax removal or drops, mastoid, throat, tonsil, lymph-node, neck, nasal, sinus, previous-record, generic management, general safety-netting, fixed two-week review, and combined history-draft fields remain unsupported.
The workflow must not assume wax explains hearing loss, tinnitus, pain, discharge, or vertigo before clinician examination.
Removal method, drops, irrigation, hearing-aid selection, referral urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
